d-flex: Rishab Sharma at learning and upskilling...
d-none: I have learnt a lot of technical things here. Particularly, I have learnt about drilling. What is cementing, and how it is done. The work environment here is very friendly, the seniors are very supportive. I would like to thank the Government of India and ONGC for this opportunity
d-none 2: I was selected at ONGC, Jorhat. It has been about 3 months now. My mentors are very good here. They teach me in a basic way. I have learnt to work on software’s like MS office.My confidence level, communication skills, grooming, have improved. I would like to thank the ONGC and the Government of India for providing this opportunity.
d-none 3: I am learning about various industrial softwares and about satellite waves and hydrocarbon exploration. Along with the technical skills, I am also engaged in workshops and presentations, where I get to interact with the professionals. Recently, I have attended a presentation on green hydrogen, which was great. Professionals there guided me personally and taught me about the concept. It is a great experience here.
d-none 4: I have been selected as an intern through PM Internship Scheme in ONGC, Jorhatt. After being selected as an intern, we have been given a lot of training from the company, like health safety, fire safety and cyber-crime. After that, I have been posted as an intern in Regional Geoscience Lab. I have learned technical skills like oil parameters, pore point, density, water content and many more. I would like to thank ONGC and the government for this opportunity.
d-none 5: I have learnt how to interact with people, how to handle situations, how to handle calls, and how grooming changes your personality. Those who want to come to this internship program, I would urge you to apply for the internship program on portal, you can apply and then you will get the opportunity to work and learn.
d-none 6: I was given a task that I had never done before, and that was to speak on call with our stakeholders. I completed the task and received appreciation for it from my supervisor. I felt that I could do more.
d-none 7: Everyone is very nice to me. The manager is very polite. I have learnt a lot of skills, they taught me about a lot of things like computer, registering arrival and departure data.
d-none 8: This opportunity has provided me with valuable hands-on experience and helped me enhance my skills in the corporate world. The mentorship and guidance I have received here have been incredibly insightful and beneficial for my professional growth. I would like to take a moment to express my gratitude to the Prime Minister and the Government of India for offering such a wonderful opportunity.
